name: project44
what_it_does: Enterprise supply chain visibility platform providing real-time tracking across ocean, air, parcel, truckload, LTL, and rail modes with predictive ETAs and exception management.
use_cases: Real-time shipment tracking across all transportation modes
Predictive ETA calculation for inbound and outbound freight
Exception alerting when shipments deviate from plan
Supply chain event correlation and analytics
not_for: Small businesses or startups (enterprise sales cycle required)
best_when: Large enterprise needs unified visibility across complex multi-modal freight networks with predictive analytics.
avoid_when: You need a quick-start API without sales engagement, or your volume is parcel/SMB scale.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for machine-to-machine. Scopes map to specific API capabilities. Onboarding requires enterprise account provisioning.

pricing.notes: Custom enterprise pricing only. Requires sales engagement and contract. No self-serve access.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Error responses exist but are inconsistent across endpoints; some return generic HTTP errors without actionable detail.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No explicit idempotency key support documented; agents must track state externally.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 token expiry is not clearly documented; agents must handle 401 refresh proactively
Carrier onboarding in the portal is required before tracking those carriers via API
Some endpoints require separate entitlements beyond base contract
Webhook event schemas vary by transport mode — no unified event envelope
Sandbox environment has limited carrier coverage compared to production

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth2 with scopes is solid. SOC2 and ISO27001 certified. However, fine-grained scope documentation is sparse and carrier credential management is opaque.
